wifi.body_template:
Hi {first_name},

The WiFi details for {property_name} are available in your resident welcome guide. If you cannot access it, reply and we will resend the details securely.

Best,
{manager_name}

bin_collection.body_template:
Hi {first_name},

Bin and recycling collection times for {property_name} are listed in the resident handbook. Please place items in the designated area the evening before collection.

Best,
{manager_name}

direct_debit.body_template:
Hi {first_name},

To set up direct debit, please complete the mandate form and return it to the management office. We can share the form again if needed.

Best,
{manager_name}

parking.body_template:
Hi {first_name},

For parking access at {property_name}, please confirm your unit details and vehicle registration. We will then issue or reactivate your permit/fob.

Best,
{manager_name}

move_in_checklist.body_template:
Hi {first_name},

Welcome to {property_name}. Your move-in checklist includes ID verification, inventory confirmation, and key collection at reception. Reply with your preferred arrival time if you need help scheduling.

Best,
{manager_name}
